text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy and Sweep Tosho are<n>in a cafe
holding a strategy meeting<n>about their project for
Reading Week.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's with that giant stack of<n>paper?! Is
that some kind of magic<n>tome?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
No... These are just some materials<n>I've put
together on the selling points<n>of books I picked
out.
choice_data_list:
The sheer volume, though... I think it's going to
be a hard sell.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No one's gonna wanna look through<n>all that!
You've gotta keep it short<n>and sweet, like
Granny does!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You think so?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Granny used to show me all her<n>magic spells!
Like one that changed<n>the color of flowers, or this
other one<n>that made a dove come flying out of a
box.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Seeing them for myself made them<n>way easier to
understand than if I'd<n>had to read through some
big ol'<n>spellbook. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I see...
choice_data_list:
It might be a good idea to let people experience
the selling points themselves.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Well, if we're going to do that... Why<n>don't we do
something that recreates<n>memorable moments
from some of<n>the books?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I like it! It'll make people feel like<n>they're inside
the books! Sounds fun!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Okay, we've decided what we're<n>going to do! All
we need to do now<n>is...
choice_data_list: Find an enticing way to promote it?
Figure out how to enhance the atmosphere?
We should think hard about the costumes too!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Good point. It won't matter how much<n>effort we
put into the exhibition if<n>nobody comes to see it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
If we go somewhere with a lot of foot<n>traffic... we
might be able to find some<n>good examples to use
as reference.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...And so, we settle our bill and take a<n>stroll
outside the cafe.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Handing out flyers and calling out to<n>people seem
to be the tried-and-true<n>methods... but we need
something<n>extra that'll grab people's attention.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! It's Magical ☆ Derby Girl! I<n>can't believe
she's really here!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Did you just say Derby Girl?!Where is she?! Where?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: S-Sweep?! Wait a second!

text_block_list.name: Witch-Costumed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Catch Derby Girl doing her thing atthe marvelously ☆ majestic ♪Magical Derby Girl Returnsshow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Witch-Costumed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everybody! I hope to see you all<n>in the
audience soon! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go! There's no way I'm<n>missing this!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay, we're all going! Let's gosee the Derby Girl show together!
choice_data_list:
What about looking for examples on how to
promote the exhibit?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sure it'll be fine! Besides, we<n>just saw a
great example...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Well... I was just thinking we could<n>try doing
what Derby Girl did.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Instead of just talking to people, why<n>don't we
dress up as characters<n>from the books? I think
that'd really<n>grab people's attention!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It might be a little embarrassing... but<n>if we try it
somewhere crowded like<n>the central plaza, I'm
sure it'll work!
choice_data_list: I think so too. Let's try it.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Me too! Me too! I'd be happy to help<n>out if it
means I can dress up as a<n>magical girl. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Now we can enjoy the Derby<n>Girl show
guilt-free! ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(If you two are with me, I'm sure it'll<n>work out...
Let's make sure everyone<n>knows how exciting
our event will<n>be!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You're right. The exhibition would be<n>even more
immersive if we really<n>made it feel like a living,
breathing<n>story!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Atmosphere... But how do we<n>enhance
something we can't see or<n>touch or anything?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Is that you, Cafe?! And you're<n>drinking tea!
That's not like you.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah. I thought you were the black<n>coffee
type?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's going on?! A power<n>outage?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah! Thank goodness, the lights are—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Eek! Again?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Clatter, clatter!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Eeeeeek! Something's making a<n>weird noise this
time!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I wonder if everything's back to<n>normal now...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ah... You guys are also here?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Y-yes...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Cafe? Did you just come in?
choice_data_list: So that person we saw just now was...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Urghhh... I think we might want to stay<n>away from
that cafe for a little while...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What the heck was that?! It wasn't<n>even a
haunted house! Why did all<n>that happen?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Yeah... It was like we were in a horror<n>novel or—

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um... Maybe we could make the<n>experience more
atmospheric with<n>stage effects? We could use
lights<n>and sounds, like what happened just
now!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
That was f-frightening, but... I<n>suppose it gave us
some good ideas.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but still! I never want to go<n>through
anything like that again!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, with the two Umamusume still<n>trembling,
the three of us head home.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Right. Our outfits might be just as<n>important as
our exhibit.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! If I go to an exhibition on<n>stories about
magic, I wanna see a<n>magical girl there!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it... There was a<n>concert outfit
that looked like it would<n>be right at home in a
fantasy world.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's use that! How about the<n>other
costumes? Should we rent them<n>from
somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I think Fuji might be able to help<n>us! She
knows quite a lot about<n>costumes!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
She used to be a child actor, so she<n>might be able
to recommend a place<n>with a bunch of stage
costumes we<n>could use!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I see... Well, it certainly sounds like<n>you're going
to make this year's<n>Reading Week one to
remember!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If it's costumes you're after, I'll set<n>you up with
someone I know. I'm<n>sure they'll have quite a
selection.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yay! Hey, you've been a big help! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I can't bear to see my darling ponies<n>looking
troubled when they're trying<n>their very best... I
shall spare no effort<n>in keeping your smiles right
side up.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah... Oh my!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
F-Fuji... I'm not sure why, but my<n>heart always
starts pounding when<n>you say things like that...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Perhaps it's because Iwish to make your heart beatfaster.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
A single line can greatly impact the<n>emotions of
those who hear it.<n>Whether it is delivered on
stage or in<n>simple conversation matters not.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Actors perform by envisioning the<n>sort of
character they're playing, how<n>they feel, and
what exactly they wish<n>to convey.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This ensures that the audience will<n>find
themselves drawn into the world<n>of the story.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: The world... of the story...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um... Would you mind telling us more?<n>I want to
hear about the principles of<n>performance!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the event will be even more<n>wonderful
if we can truly inhabit our<n>characters!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
With pleasure! If it's for darling<n>ponies who
appreciate a good story, I<n>shall assist in any way
I can.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki shares her acting<n>knowledge, and I
find myself feeling a<n>little smarter for having
listened to<n>her.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...So that's what I'm thinking—an<n>exhibition
focused on spreading the<n>allure of stories.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I want to show everyone what makes<n>books
special... I don't want to let<n>these wonderful
stories be<n>overlooked!

text_block_list.name: Library Assistant A
text_block_list.text:
...You know, I think that could really<n>get people
excited.

text_block_list.name: Library Assistant B
text_block_list.text:
Right... It sounds pretty tough, but I<n>think I wanna
try it. I want to share<n>my favorite books with
people too!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sold on Zenno Rob Roy's sheer<n>passion, the
library helpers settle on<n>her idea for the event. All
that's left<n>now is to prepare.
